name: AI vs Human Expert Reasoning: Assessing Agreements in Building Typology Predictions based on Street View Imagery
summary: arXiv:2607.14756v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This research investigates the potential of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to infer building typologies: Construction, Current Use, and Storeys from G...
description: arXiv:2607.14756v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This research investigates the potential of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to infer building typologies: Construction, Current Use, and Storeys from Google Street View (GSV) images. Predictions generated by VLMs are compared with inference by human experts (civil engineers and architects) as a source of manually labelled ground-truth data. We evalu...
author: Zahratu Shabrina, Muhammad Asa, Jin Rui, Lu Yin, Stephen Law
